meta.title: About AI Game Connect — Healthier Real-Life Competition Communities
meta.description: Learn how AI Game Connect is building safer, smarter, and more rewarding real-life gaming and sports communities through approved places and clear rules.

hero.title: Building healthier real-life competition communities.
hero.body: AI Game Connect is a preview ecosystem for safer real-life games, approved places, clear competition, rankings, and rewards.

sections.title: To make real-life games and sports easier to discover, safer to join, more competitive, and more rewarding.
sections.body: The mission starts with activities players already love and venues that can support safe, organized play.

sections.title: This is not another group chat.
sections.body: The point is to move players from scattered planning into organized real-life play: approved places, clear times, known locations, visible pricing, shared rules, future rankings, and rewards that follow verified activity.

sections.title: Approved places, rankings, and rewards need the same clear standards.
sections.body: Approved places keep play public and accountable. Clear rules make future rankings and rewards easier to trust, because progress should come from verified play rather than private arrangements.

sections.title: Connect → Compete → Rank → Reward
sections.body: Four simple ideas shape the product experience.

items.title: Connect
items.body: Players find activities and approved places.

items.title: Compete
items.body: Matches and competitions have clear rules.

items.title: Rank
items.body: Verified activity can shape future rankings.

items.title: Reward
items.body: Progress can unlock recognition and future offers.

sections.title: The rules are simple on purpose.
sections.body: No betting. No gambling. No poker. No private places. Approved venues, fields, courts, and activity spaces only. Clear time, location, pricing, and rules.

sections.title: Find better ways to play in real life.
sections.body: AI Game Connect helps players move from scattered plans to clear activity paths.

items.title: Request or join games
items.body: Share what you want to play and where.

items.title: Use approved places
items.body: Stay connected to venues, fields, and courts.

items.title: Track future progress
items.body: Prepare for ranking and rewards when profiles launch.

sections.title: Receive organized, trusted player demand.
sections.body: Approved venues can become visible inside the activity ecosystem.

items.title: More organized demand
items.body: Connect with players actively looking to book and return.

items.title: Built-in visibility
items.body: Appear in activity, competition, ranking, and reward contexts.

items.title: Trusted player standards
items.body: Players agree to clear safety expectations before launch.

sections.title: A trusted layer for real-life play.
sections.body: The future vision is a network where players can discover activities, use Dawrak for updates, compete at approved places, track fair rankings, and unlock useful rewards without unsafe behavior or unclear arrangements.

sections.title: Join the early community.
sections.body: Register as a player or venue partner and help shape the first approved activity network.

sections.title: About AI Game Connect.
sections.body: A quick overview of who the product is for.
